title: Intermediaries, Hop-by-Hop Fields, Forwarding, and Transformation · Runtime Recall
summary: A delayed handoff reconstructs intermediaries, hop-by-hop fields, forwarding, and transformation from bounded byte and state evidence, challenges one misconception, and revises the intermediary forwarding and transformation contract. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for intermediary forwarding and transformation contract after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Remove Connection and every nominated hop-by-hop field before forwarding, then establish fields for the new hop.
Model downstream and upstream connections, framing, versions, deadlines, addresses, TLS, and failures as independent protocol hops.
Update framing, validators, digests, content codings, warnings, and signatures when an intermediary transforms content.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Hop By Hop Removal · changed case · Review Hop By Hop Removal
steps.instruction:
review case — A review protocol team handles case 2267 in a signed webhook receiver behind an HTTP/2 to HTTP/1.1 gateway. Build deterministic Go evidence to strip dynamically nominated hop fields and repair metadata after transformations; preserve this operating constraint: the maintained Go protocol stack remains the production transfer target; then inject Transfer-Encoding plus Content-Length and close before any downstream forwarding. Browser code models bounded byte and state decisions only. Sockets, listeners, live TLS, proxies, packet capture, fuzz campaigns, races, load, HTTP/2, HTTP/3, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Remove Connection and every nominated hop-by-hop field before forwarding, then establish fields for the new hop.

Which action demonstrates Hop By Hop Removal without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: Hop By Hop Removal · changed case · Review Hop By Hop Removal.
